inputs.label: Required Sleep per Day (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Ideal sleep duration recommended for an adult to maintain cognitive and physical performance.

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 1 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Monday (first day of assessment period).

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 2 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Tuesday.

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 3 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Wednesday.

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 4 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Thursday.

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 5 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Friday.

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 6 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Saturday.

inputs.label: Actual Sleep Day 7 (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Hours of sleep obtained on Sunday.

formulas.totalSleepDebt: Math.max(requiredSleepPerDay - actualSleepDay1, 0) + Math.max(requiredSleepPerDay - actualSleepDay2, 0) + Math.max(requiredSleepPerDay - actualSleepDay3, 0) + Math.max(requiredSleepPerDay - actualSleepDay4, 0) + Math.max(requiredSleepPerDay - actualSleepDay5, 0) + Math.max(requiredSleepPerDay - actualSleepDay6, 0) + Math.max(requiredSleepPerDay - actualSleepDay7, 0)
